# applicationset-full

ApplicationSet controller flags including k8s client, repo server certs, scm root ca

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/applicationset-full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.leader.election: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: create-update
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.policy.override: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.concurrent.reconciliations.max: "10"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.new.git.file.globbing: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.debug: "false"
  applicationsetcontroller.log.format: json
  applicationsetcontroller.log.level: info
  applicationsetcontroller.dryrun: "false"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.git.submodule: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.namespaces: argocd,argocd-appsets-*
  applicationsetcontroller.scm.root.ca.path: /app/config/scm/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.allowed.scm.providers: https://git.example.com/,https://gitlab.example.com/
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.scm.providers: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.webhook.parallelism.limit: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.requeue.after: 3m
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.tokenref.strict.mode: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.annotations: acme.com/annotation1,acme.com/annotation2
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.labels: acme.com/label1,acme.com/label2
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.github.api.metrics: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.status.max.resources.count: "5000"
  applicationsetcontroller.profile.enabled: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.key
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  applicationSet:
    allowedSCMProviderURLs:
    - https://git.example.com/
    - https://gitlab.example.com/
    dryRun: false
    gitHubAPIMetricsEnabled: true
    gitSubmoduleEnabled: true
    globalPreserved:
      annotationKeys:
      - acme.com/annotation1
      - acme.com/annotation2
      labelKeys:
      - acme.com/label1
      - acme.com/label2
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    k8sClient:
      burst: 100
      maxIdleConnections: 500
      qps: "50"
      tcp:
        idleTimeout: 5m0s
        keepAlive: 30s
        timeout: 30s
      tlsHandshakeTimeout: 10s
    leaderElectionEnabled: true
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    namespaceGlobs:
    - argocd
    - argocd-appsets-*
    newGitFileGlobbingEnabled: true
    policy: create-update
    policyOverrideEnabled: true
    profileEnabled: true
    progressiveSyncs:
      enabled: true
    reconciliationsParallelismLimit: 10
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.crt
    requeueAfter: 3m0s
    scmProvidersEnabled: true
    scmRootCAPath: /app/config/scm/ca.crt
    statusMaxResourcesCount: 5000
    tokenRefStrictModeEnabled: true
    webhookParallelismLimit: 50
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  applicationsetcontroller.allowed.scm.providers: https://git.example.com/,https://gitlab.example.com/
  applicationsetcontroller.concurrent.reconciliations.max: "10"
  applicationsetcontroller.dryrun: "false"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.git.submodule: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.github.api.metrics: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.leader.election: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.new.git.file.globbing: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.policy.override: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.progressive.syncs: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.scm.providers: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.enable.tokenref.strict.mode: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.annotations: acme.com/annotation1,acme.com/annotation2
  applicationsetcontroller.global.preserved.labels: acme.com/label1,acme.com/label2
  applicationsetcontroller.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.burst: "100"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.max.idle.connections: "500"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.client.qps: "50"
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.idle.timeout: 5m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.keepalive: 30s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tcp.timeout: 30s
  applicationsetcontroller.k8s.tls.handshake.timeout: 10s
  applicationsetcontroller.log.format: json
  applicationsetcontroller.log.level: info
  applicationsetcontroller.namespaces: argocd,argocd-appsets-*
  applicationsetcontroller.policy: create-update
  applicationsetcontroller.profile.enabled: "true"
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.key
  applicationsetcontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.requeue.after: 3m0s
  applicationsetcontroller.scm.root.ca.path: /app/config/scm/ca.crt
  applicationsetcontroller.status.max.resources.count: "5000"
  applicationsetcontroller.webhook.parallelism.limit: "50"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
